title: flowguard_implement
description: Record implementation evidence OR submit implementation review verdict. Mode A: no reviewVerdict. Mode B: provide reviewVerdict.

reviewVerdict.description: Implementation review verdict. Omit to record implementation evidence.

reviewFindings.description: Structured review findings from independent review.

reviewerUnavailable.description: Set to true when the reviewer subagent cannot be invoked.

ReviewFindings.description: Structured findings from the flowguard-reviewer subagent.
